name: Chocolate-Butterscotch Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Butterscotch pudding mix; 3/4 cup Light cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Beat eggs in a large bowl until very thick. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients and remaining liquid ingredients (butterscotch pudding mix, light cream, vanilla extract). Mix well with a whisk or hand mixer, being careful not to overmix.
3. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Pour batter into a lightly greased 9 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before cutting into bars.
Yield: about 2 dozen bars.
